message:
feat: implement bubbles list-based configuration with professional UI

Replaces custom bubbletea TUI with bubbles list component for superior UX:

Bubbles List Benefits:
- Stable navigation with proper arrow key handling (no huh issues)
- Professional item rendering with custom delegate
- No content jumping - consistent cursor positioning
- Built-in list management and focus handling

Professional Styling:
- Remove emojis for clean appearance
- Colored toggles: green "ON" / gray "OFF" (not brackets)
- Clean button highlighting without problematic borders
- Consistent spacing and fixed-width layout

Stable Layout Features:
- Fixed cursor position ("> ") - no jumping content
- Always-visible descriptions for all fields
- Right-aligned toggle widgets with proper spacing
- Professional color scheme with lipgloss styling
- Save/Cancel buttons at bottom of list

Technical Implementation:
- ConfigListItem implements list.Item interface
- ConfigListDelegate provides custom rendering
- Proper bubbles list integration with Update/View
- Toggle and select value changes update list items
- Safe config preservation maintained

Navigation:
- ↑/↓ arrows navigate between all items (runtime, credentials, buttons)
- Enter/Space activates toggles, selects, and buttons
- 'q' cancels, saves work via button or 's' shortcut
- Smooth scrolling and focus management via bubbles

This addresses all UI issues: no jumping, professional toggles,
clean buttons, stable navigation, and polished appearance.

🤖 Generated with Claude Code
